description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, black glass touchscreen with a small notch at the top housing a front-facing camera and possibly a speaker. The back is reflective, likely glass, with a dual-lens camera module and flash arranged vertically in the top left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with visible buttons for volume and power. The back also displays a minimalistic abstract design in black and orange hues. There are no visible brand logos or external cases, giving the device a clean and contemporary appearance.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a reflective back featuring an abstract design.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large, black glass touchscreen with a notch for the front camera and speaker.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displays a reflective surface with a dual-lens camera module in the top left and an abstract black and orange design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows additional side buttons and the device's thinness.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is blank and appears to be turned off, with no visible icons, wallpaper, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a single front-facing camera centered above the screen in the notch, and a dual-lens camera module with flash arranged vertically in the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both sides: likely a power button on the right edge and volume buttons on the left edge, all elongated and flush with the frame.
